subject: fix(debug): add debugLog to error paths and clean up unused sources
body:
Add debugLog calls to FormRenderer submission catch, PublicFormPage
submission catch, and ImportFormDialog parse failure. Remove unused
template-only debug sources (db, graph, graphData, seed) and add
project-specific 'form' source. Update DebugPill source colors.

Tags: debug, cleanup, error-handling
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
